headings.usage: Hero heading, section titles, pricing tier names

body.usage: All paragraph text, code blocks, navigation, buttons

layout_spacing.grid_strategy: MODE A: TETRIS GRID for features, bento style with wide gap-8
layout_spacing.borders: Square edges, sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). 1px solid borders.

buttons.primary: Sharp edges (rounded-none), bg-[#00FF41] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-[#CCFF00] transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,255,65,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: Sharp edges, bg-transparent border border-[#333] text-white hover:border-[#00FF41] hover:text-[#00FF41] transition-colors

hero.style: Terminal CLI vibe. Asymmetric. Large Space Mono header. Background with subtle noise and grid lines.
hero.interactive: Live typing effect for CLI install command. '> npm i -g profitengine'

playground.style: Split-pane code editor layout. Left: Source A & Source B (tabs), Right: AST Merged Output. JetBrains Mono font inside.
playground.accents: Neon green line numbers, active tab glow, mock diff logic displaying AST merging.
playground.container: Border-collapse style layout. Background pure black or very dark gray, 1px border (#2A2A2A).

cards.style: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). border-collapse style layout. Background pure black or very dark gray, 1px border. Hover effect: Tracing Beam or subtle green shadow.

waitlist_form.style: Terminal input style. Prefix with '>_'. No background, bottom border only on focus, glowing submit button.

stats.style: Large neon green numbers (text-5xl or 6xl Space Mono), muted description. Files merged, Repos analyzed, Devs joined.

motion_micro_interactions.hover: Sharp, instantaneous color swaps. High contrast.
motion_micro_interactions.scroll: Subtle reveal, no bouncy animations. Use Framer Motion for precise, rigid entrance.
motion_micro_interactions.typing: Simulated terminal typing for code snippets or headlines.

images.description: Abstract dark mode background, cinematic terminal hacker aesthetic
images.usage: Use as an absolutely positioned background image in the Hero section with opacity-20 or opacity-30 and a black gradient overlay.

images.description: Abstract 3D rendering of an abstract syntax tree (AST) data structure
images.usage: Use in the feature section explaining the AST logic or next to the Playground.

icons.installation: yarn add lucide-react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge
icons.style: Stroke width 1.5, color #00FF41 for active/accents, #9CA3AF for passive. NO EMOJIS.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over dark backgrounds meets APCA standards. Use text-shadow if needed. Text hover states must always be clearly defined.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='waitlist-input')

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Electric & Neon (Terminal/Hacker) aesthetic. NO PURPLE, no rounded-xl or rounded-full for layout containers.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout. Do not over-rely on Shadcn for layout containers as they are too rigid for creative marketing pages.
Make the Playground functional using React state or simple mock merging to show AST functionality live.
Add a global CSS noise overlay or inline SVG noise to give it a gritty terminal feel.
Ensure 'Space Mono' is used for all major section headings, and 'JetBrains Mono' for body copy and code blocks.
Include a live counter for 'stats' (files merged, developers joined) with simple JS interval logic or framer-motion.
Pricing cards should resemble hacker terminal windows with 'Hobby', 'Pro', 'Enterprise' tiers and green accents.
Embed the interactive playground directly on the landing page, allowing users to paste 2 Python/JS code snippets and 'merge' them.
Footer should include GitHub link, docs, and CLI install command in a pure monospace terminal layout.
